name: Gary and His Demons
overview: Gary is a cantankerous, aging demon slayer who has nothing left to lose. Burdened by his “chosen one” status and backed by a team of specialists he can’t relate to, Gary struggles to keep interest in the Earth-saving duty he never asked for and doesn’t want.

trailers.title: Look Mom! Productions' Gary & His Demons (16x11')
